_comment: operon-plugin hooks. PreToolUse fires the guardrail-rule evaluator out-of-process via pretooluse-wrapper -> pretooluse.py, which reuses operon_mcp_server.rules + guardrail_log.jsonl. The matcher Bash|Edit|Write|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit limits firing to side-effectful tools. Land 4 removed the Stop hook block (it called nudge.fire_due_nudges, which is gone with the nudge mechanism; agent lifecycle is the Anthropic runtime's contract under Agent Teams).
